name: insert-build-present
goal: Full user journey sketch: start from a chart, build a small plan (add row, add task, link), then deselect for a presentable slide.

steps.note: Starting chart visible; document-context app bar (scale/settings/insert) when nothing selected (SR-BAR).
Discover row-adder chips on rail boundaries (UF-06 / SR-IXC-14).
Drag-create a task with real bar preview (SR-IXC-05).
Port-link two tasks if ports present (UF-11).
Deselect for presentation — no sticky item context (UF-07).
Presentable: calm chrome, hairline overall if selected, labels readable.

notes: Manual-assisted OK if walkthrough runner lacks some targets; still a review checklist for Phase 13 v2.8.3.
